title: ornithopus perpusillus
intro: Ornithopus perpusillus, also known as small bird's foot or dwarf trefoil, is a perennial herb that belongs to the pea family and is native to southern Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Ornithopus perpusillus include its ability to relieve menstrual cramps, reduce fever, and soothe digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions due to its potent medicinal properties.
